name: Logical Gate
description: Performs AND, OR, or NOT logic operations.
python_code:
def _run_logic(self):
    a = bool(self.get_parameter('a', False))
    b = bool(self.get_parameter('b', False))
    op = self.get_parameter('operation', 'AND')
    
    if op == 'AND': res = a and b
    elif op == 'OR': res = a or b
    elif op == 'NOT': res = not a
    else: res = False
    return res

async def execute(self, inputs):
    res = self._run_logic()
    await self.set_output('result', res)
    await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
    return {'result': res}

async def on_parameter_changed(self, name, value):
    if name in ['a', 'b', 'operation']:
        res = self._run_logic()
        await self.set_output('result', res)
